method_summary: Proposes using MVCC principles to manage concurrency in lakehouses for AI agents, with data and compute isolation through a unified API to simplify governance challenges.
key_innovation: Novel abstractions and isolation primitives for an 'agent-first lakehouse' called Bauplan, which accommodates usage patterns of swarms of agents and simplifies governance through a concise API surface.
baselines_compared: monolithic SQL-only transactional databases like Postgres
best_result: Not applicable - this is a position paper without empirical results
limitations_stated: A direct mapping of existing techniques from traditional databases will not work in a distributed, heterogeneous system such as a lakehouse
title: Trustworthy AI in the Agentic Lakehouse: from Concurrency to Governance
